message:
test(wave-55): derive trait coverage for HybridTime, LogicalClockKind, LedgerStats, SLViolation, etc.

10 new tests: vclock (HybridTime, LogicalClockKind, LogicalTime, LogicalClockMode),
ledger (LedgerStats, LeakCheckResult), separation_logic (OperationFootprint,
JudgmentOp, SLViolation, VerificationResult).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
